Provenance.drafts: 4 candidates generated locally via ComfyUI MCP (single pass, no escalation needed); curated per art/pipeline/README.md
Provenance.paintoverNote: c3 (seed+3) -- flooded colonnade with a centered altar cross + foreground skulls on the water, strongest atmospheric depth (near skulls, mid pillars, far lit apse) and the most distinctly funerary/crypt read of the batch. c0 was a multi-view concept sheet (not a single scene); c1/c2 were close variants of the same colonnade, both usable backups.
Provenance.aiDisclosure: AI-generated (SDXL base 1.0) diffuse. Same deviation as gloomwood-backdrop: cutout.py's BiRefNet segmentation was skipped (verified it would discard the majority of a full-bleed backdrop as 'background'); the raw 1024x1024 SDXL output was format-converted straight to a fully-opaque RGBA (no normalmap.py -- AssetSpec.NormalMap=false, flat far plane per SunkenCryptSpecs.cs). PaletteId fixed from the file's default ('house') to 'crypt' (art/specs/sunkencrypt/SunkenCryptSpecs.cs) for this asset and sunkencrypt-entrance ONLY, to match the module's own doc-comment ('All crypt palette family') and the plan's family-distinctness requirement -- the other 6 sunkencrypt specs (monsters/prop, deferred long tail) were left untouched.
